settings.heading: Sparkling Water, Perfectly Portable
settings.subheading: Carbonate anywhere. Flavor in seconds. Fizz up your day.

settings.heading: Carbonation made the right way
settings.body: Fizz is a portable carbonation bottle paired with our in-house flavor packs so you can liven up your water in seconds—anytime, anywhere.

settings.title: Super delicious
settings.quote: Crisp bubbles and clean flavor. Perfect straight from the bottle.
settings.author: Dana A.

settings.title: My go-to fizz
settings.quote: Rich flavor with a smooth finish. Stands out from other portable options.
settings.author: Mike S.

settings.title: Clean and refreshing
settings.quote: Refreshing without tasting watered down. Love the Coral Orange finish.
settings.author: Jordan L.

settings.title: Perfectly balanced
settings.quote: Strong sparkle without being overpowering. Feels thoughtfully made.
settings.author: Sam T.

settings.title: Desk essential
settings.quote: I keep these stocked for busy mornings and long work sessions.
settings.author: Riley P.

settings.title: Better than cans
settings.quote: No bitterness, just clean sparkling water with flavor I actually want.
settings.author: Chris M.

settings.heading: Delicious fizz made for everyday
settings.body: Crafted for busy days and slow moments alike.

settings.heading: Delicious fizz made for everyday
settings.body: Crafted for busy days and slow moments alike — smooth sparkle, real flavor packs, and CO₂ that actually lasts.

settings.heading: Our journey began with a single sip, sparking a passion for portable sparkling water done right.
settings.body: Fizz was created with one simple goal: make sparkling water that tastes great and fits effortlessly into everyday life. Good hydration shouldn’t be complicated — just carefully crafted, thoughtfully portable, and ready when you are.
